languages.text: "Это наш дом. Злобный, дикий, смертоносный. Подстать нам".
"This is our home. Bitter, wild, and deadly. Just like us."
languages.original_text: "Это наш дом. Злобный, дикий, смертоносный. Подстать нам".

traits.locale_text: "This is our home. Bitter, wild and lethal. Exactly as we are."
"This is our home. Bitter, wild and lethal. Exactly as we are."
"This is our home. Bitter, wild, and deadly. Just like us."
"This is our home. Bitter, wild, and deadly. Just like us."
"This is our home. Bitter, wild, and deadly. Just like us."

languages.text: "Das ist unsere Heimat. Bitter, wild und tödlich. Genau wie wir."
languages.original_text: "This is our home. Bitter, wild, and deadly. Just like us."

traits.locale_text: "Das ist unsere Heimat. Bitter, wild und tödlich. Genau wie wir."

languages.text: « C'est notre chez-nous. Une terre amère, sauvage et mortelle, comme ses habitants. »
languages.original_text: "This is our home. Bitter, wild, and deadly. Just like us."

traits.locale_text: « C'est notre chez-nous. Une terre amère, sauvage et mortelle, comme ses habitants. »

languages.text: «Este es nuestro hogar. Inhóspito, salvaje y letal. Igual que nosotros».
languages.original_text: "This is our home. Bitter, wild, and deadly. Just like us."

traits.locale_text: «Este es nuestro hogar. Inhóspito, salvaje y letal. Igual que nosotros».

languages.text: "Burası bizim yuvamız. Acı, vahşi ve ölümcül. Tıpkı bizim gibi."
languages.original_text: "This is our home. Bitter, wild, and deadly. Just like us."

traits.locale_text: "Burası bizim yuvamız. Acı, vahşi ve ölümcül. Tıpkı bizim gibi."

languages.text: “这是我们的家园。苦涩、狂野、致命。就像我们一样。”
languages.original_text: "This is our home. Bitter, wild, and deadly. Just like us."

traits.locale_text: “这是我们的家园。苦涩、狂野、致命。就像我们一样。”

languages.text: 「ここは俺たちの家だ。苦い、荒れ果てた、そして死の淵にある。俺たちと同じように。」
languages.original_text: "This is our home. Bitter, wild, and deadly. Just like us."

traits.locale_text: 「ここは俺たちの家だ。苦い、荒れ果てた、そして死の淵にある。俺たちと同じように。」
